title: Notice for Start Dates after End Dates
excerpt: We have issues with users accidentally selecting start dates that occur after end dates. monday has an automation to ensure end date is always after start date but it just pushes the dates out and does not send a warning…

posts.author: achau (Amy Chau)
posts.cookedHtml: We have issues with users accidentally selecting start dates that occur after end dates. monday has an automation to ensure end date is always after start date but it just pushes the dates out and does not send a warning message, or some sort of pop up to let the user know. Could we get some kind of pop up message that lets the user know that the start date is after end date?
